title: Verify Backend Control of Incentive Offer
description: Tests that the 'First Month Discount' offer is correctly gated by a backend configuration.
preconditions: User has an active ₹1 trial and is in the 'Trial Corner' cohort.

steps.description: 1. Ensure the incentive offer is DISABLED in the backend.
2. Follow the cancellation flow: Click 'Cancel Trial', then 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access'.
3. Verify the 'Incentive' offer pop-up does NOT appear and the user is taken directly to the feedback pop-up.
4. Enable the incentive offer in the backend.
5. With a different user, repeat step 2.
6. Verify the 'Incentive' offer pop-up with a backend-driven title and price DOES appear.

expected_result: The display of the incentive offer during the cancellation flow is successfully controlled by the backend configuration.
